content:
```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Transcription"] --> B["ASR Decoder"]
    B --> C["Feed-forward Network"]
    B --> D["Self-Attention"]
    C --> E["×L/2"]
    D --> E
    E --> F["Speech Tokenizers"]
    F --> G["Vector Quantizer"]
    F --> H["Pooling Layer"]
    F --> I["Feed-forward Network"]
    F --> J["Block Causal Self-Attention"]
    I --> K["×L/2"]
    J --> K
    K --> L["Speech"]
    L --> M["Speech Tokenizers"]
    M --> N["Embedding"]
    N --> O["Feed-forward Network"]
    N --> P["Block Causal Self-Attention"]
    O --> Q["Noise"]
    P --> Q
    Q --> R["Conditional Flow Matching"]
    R --> S["Mel spectrograms"]
    S --> T["HiFi-GAN Vocoder"]
    T --> U["Speech"]
```

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Text Corpus"] --> B["Text-to-Token LM"]
    B --> C["Synthesize Interleaved Data"]
    C --> D["Stage I: Large-scale Speech-Text Pre-training"]
    D --> E["Speech"]
    E --> F["Q_speech"]
    F --> G["Stage II: Supervised Fine-tuning w/ "Streaming Thoughts" Template"]
    G --> H["Speech"]
    H --> I["Speech"]
    I --> J["Speech"]
    J --> K["GLM-4-Voice"]
    K --> L["Speech Input"]
    L --> M["Speech Tokenizer"]
    M --> N["User Input"]
    N --> O["Speech Decoder"]
    O --> P["Model Output"]
    P --> Q["Latency: ~20 tokens"]
    Q --> K
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style P fill:#bbf,stroke:#333
```
- Speech-to-Text: The model generates a text response, \( A_{t} \), based on the user's speech input, \( Q_{s} \).
- Speech-and-Text-to-Speech: Leveraging both \( Q_{s} \) and \( A_{t} \), the model generates spoken output, \( A_{s} \), with adaptive tone and prosody to ensure conversational coherence.

\[
T _ {\text { llm\_prefill }} = f _ {\text { llm\_prefill }} \left(f r \cdot T _ {\text { user\_speech }}\right)
\]
